mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM activity
AND DATE(start_time) = #{date}
AND address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{province}, '%')
AND address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%')
AND address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{district}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (category_id, title, content, address, start_time, end_time, target_number, current_number, service_hours, reward_points, status, cover_image, venue_image, detailed_address, latitude, longitude, volunteer_field, volunteer_target, service_location, organization_name, organization_image, contact_person, contact_phone) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{targetNumber}, #{currentNumber}, #{serviceHours}, #{rewardPoints}, #{status}, #{coverImage}, #{venueImage}, #{detailedAddress}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{volunteerField}, #{volunteerTarget}, #{serviceLocation}, #{organizationName}, #{organizationImage}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, address = #{address}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, target_number = #{targetNumber}, current_number = #{currentNumber}, service_hours = #{serviceHours}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, status = #{status}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, venue_image = #{venueImage}, detailed_address = #{detailedAddress}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, volunteer_field = #{volunteerField}, volunteer_target = #{volunteerTarget}, service_location = #{serviceLocation}, organization_name = #{organizationName}, organization_image = #{organizationImage}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE activity SET current_number = #{number} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE title = #{title} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
